title: scaevola subalpina
intro: Scaevola subalpina, also known as Mountain Fan Flower, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Caledonia, an island in the Pacific Ocean. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scaevola subalpina include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Scaevola subalpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
